name: play
description: Plays a song (search by name or URL)

name: skip
description: Skips the current track (votes if 3+ people)

name: queue
description: Displays the queue and the currently playing song

name: nonstop
description: Toggles 24/7 mode in the voice channel

name: random
description: Adds a random song to the queue (no repeats)

name: game
description: Recommends Steam games based on your search

options.name: query
options.description: Genre, style, or name (e.g. RPG, multiplayer)

name: loop
description: Toggles loop for the current song

name: clear
description: Clears the queue, stops the music, and disconnects

name: shuffle
description: Shuffles the songs in the queue

name: replay
description: Replays the currently playing song from the beginning

name: seek
description: Fast forwards or rewinds the song

name: clip
description: Records and saves the last 30 seconds of voice chat audio
